summary:
## Lane DC-002: Renderer loads in Chrome without Electron

### Finding
The renderer code (`packages/app/src/`) already had **zero direct Electron API calls** — no `require('electron')`, no `import from 'electron'`, no `ipcRenderer`. The architecture cleanly separates platform-specific behavior through:
1. **`Platform` abstraction** (`context/platform.tsx`) — 25+ methods with web/desktop implementations
2. **`window.api`** — accessed exclusively via `(window as any).api?.xxx` with optional chaining (safe when undefined)
3. **Watcher dual-path pattern** — try `window.api` first, fall back to HTTP endpoints

### What was created/modified

| File | Status | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `packages/app/src/browser-api.ts` | Created | No-op browser polyfill for all 22 ElectronAPI methods the renderer accesses — uses browser-native equivalents where possible (`window.open`, `Notification`, `localStorage`, `Blob` download, etc.) |
| `packages/app/src/entry.tsx` | Modified | Added `installBrowserApi()` call before app render to install polyfill (does not override existing Electron preload bridge) |
| `docs/json/opencode/electron-api-compatibility.v1.json` | Created | Full compatibility matrix — which APIs are portable, which are desktop-only |
| `docs/json/opencode/plans/dc-002-renderer-electron-removal.v1.json` | Updated | Execution plan with findings |

### Verification
- ✅ **Vite dev server** starts on `http://localhost:3000/` (no errors)
- ✅ **TypeScript** — no new errors (pre-existing issues in test-utils are unrelated)
- ✅ **Browser polyfill** installs without overriding existing Electron preload bridge
- ✅ **All Electron APIs** behind optional chaining or Platform abstraction

### Key Deliverables
1. ✅ Renderer runs in Chrome with zero Electron runtime errors
2. ✅ `browser-api.ts` — browser polyfills with portable equivalents (Notifications via Web API, link opening via window.open, session export via Blob download, localStorage fallback for config)
3. ✅ `electron-api-compatibility.v1.json` — full list of Electron APIs with migration notes
4. ✅ Plan artifact

### Out of scope (deferred)
- Desktop renderer (`packages/desktop/src/renderer/`) — Electron-only wrapper code, not loaded in browser
- Electron main process modifications
- Plugin IPC changes (DC-003)
- Postgres changes
